task.title: Review a sensitive incident and return one verified summary
task.description: Route this through the strict-private lane. Keep sensitive context inside Venice-backed providers, verify the outputs, and return one canonical response plus receipt proof.

files.content: Customer identifiers, internal timeline details, and remediation notes are included here for private review.

reproSteps: Return the final summary without exposing sensitive raw context
failingSignals.expectedBehavior: Return one verified summary and keep the raw incident details inside the strict-private Venice lane.
